name: minesweeper
description: Minesweeper Game - Classic mine sweeping puzzle

scripts.build: mkdir -p www && cp index.html app.js favicon.svg manifest.json sw.js www/ && cp -r core platform platforms www/
scripts.android:prepare: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build: npm run android:prepare && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:release: npm run android:prepare && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
